name: Thought Machine
description: Vault Core cloud-native core-banking with Python smart-contract DSL.

seo.title: Thought Machine — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Thought Machine: Vault Core cloud-native core-banking with Python smart-contract DSL.

when_to_use: Cloud-native core banking with Python smart-contract DSL
Building custom financial products on Vault Core API
Replacing legacy banking cores with programmable infrastructure

pros: Python smart-contract DSL is genuinely flexible
Used by Lloyds, Standard Chartered, SEB
Configurable product logic without vendor code
cons: Massive implementation project, not a plug-in
Overkill for anything below Tier 1/2 bank
review.verdict: Serious modern core banking for large institutions — not a payment gateway, wrong category fit for most.
review.best_for: Tier 1-2 banks and neobanks replacing or launching a core banking platform
review.not_for: Fintech startups or anyone needing a payment gateway to embed

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
